model_comparisons.selection_reason: Selects the most crowded allowed narrative as a proxy for surface consensus.

Selects the highest deterministic narrative score after replay filtering.

validation.note: Real-curated validation fixture. Held-out future evidence stays separate from event-time replay inputs.

rows.expected_observable: Data Center revenue should remain the dominant revenue driver in the next reported quarter.
rows.label: validated
rows.what_happened: Held-out Q2 fiscal 2025 results reported revenue of $30.0 billion and Data Center revenue of $26.3 billion, up 16% from Q1, keeping Data Center demand central to the follow-up evidence.

rows.expected_observable: The next reported quarter should land near or above the guided revenue range.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Pending separate curation of the guidance-accuracy label; held-out Q2 results are available for review.

rows.expected_observable: Gaming revenue should become a central explanation in follow-up commentary.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Pending; no held-out validation label has been assigned to the gaming-rebound narrative.

rows.expected_observable: Later commentary should focus on Blackwell demand and production timing.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Pending separate curation of Blackwell-specific validation; held-out Q2 commentary references Hopper demand and Blackwell anticipation.
